title: Marbella Private Yacht Charter Day: Costs and Tips for 2026
html:
For a private yacht charter day in Marbella, set off from Puerto José Banús and expect to pay from €2,500 to €8,000 for a full-day crewed experience on the Mediterranean. BoatHire24 connects you with verified owners to make planning simple.

Where to set off in Marbella

Marbella has several marinas and bays from which private charters depart. Puerto José Banús is the most glamorous, lined with superyachts and designer boutiques. Puerto Deportivo de Marbella, closer to the old town, offers a more relaxed start point. For a quieter escape, head to the small Cala de Marbella or the exclusive Cabopino Marina, near the Artola dunes. Many charters also pick up from the bay of Estepona, a short cruise west.

How much does it cost to rent a boat in Marbella?

Prices for private yacht charter in Marbella range from €2,000 to €10,000 per day depending on boat size and crew. Use the boat rental Marbella search to compare verified listings and transparent pricing. The majority of boats include fuel, a skipper, and VAT, but confirm individually before booking.

  • Shared tour (RIB or small motorboat, 4 hours): from €90 per person
  • Small motorboat half-day (6 guests, no crew): from €500
  • Lagoon 42 catamaran full-day (10 guests, crewed): from €2,500
  • Crewed Azimut 60 full-day (8 guests, all inclusive): from €4,800

Which boat to rent

  1. Motor yacht (Azimut, Princess, Sunseeker), Ideal for day trips with up to 12 guests; from €3,500 for a 50ft model.
  2. Catamaran (Lagoon, Fountaine Pajot), Stable and spacious for families or groups of 10; from €2,500 full-day crewed.
  3. RIB or rigid inflatable, Perfect for water sports and short excursions to Cabopino; takes 6 guests; from €500 half-day.
  4. Sailing yacht (Jeanneau, Beneteau), For a classic sailing experience with 6 guests; from €1,800 full-day with skipper.
  5. Luxury superyacht (Maiora, Astondoa), For the ultimate private charter up to 20 guests; from €8,000 per day.

For precise details on a specific motor yacht, see the Princess V58 listing complete with photos and availability.

Do you need a licence to rent a boat in Marbella in 2026?

To rent a private crewed yacht in Marbella no licence is required, the operator provides a professional skipper. For bareboat rentals (boats without crew), you generally need an ICC (International Certificate of Competence) or equivalent Spanish licence. Local operators confirm exact requirements at booking.

Book a morning departure from Puerto Banús to avoid afternoon levante winds, which can build by 3pm. Most crews recommend a 10am start for calmest seas.

At a glance

  • Price band: €90 (shared tour) to €10,000 (private superyacht)
  • Peak months: June, July, August, September
  • Trip length: 4 hours (half-day) to 8 hours (full-day)
  • Capacity: 6 to 20 guests depending on vessel
  • Currency: EUR
  • Key departure: Puerto José Banús

Questions about boat rental in Marbella

What is the best time of year for a yacht charter in Marbella?

The best time is between May and October, with July and August offering the warmest sea temperatures and reliable sunshine, though advance booking is essential.

Can I rent a yacht for a wedding or special event in Marbella?

Yes, many operators offer wedding and event charters for up to 30 guests, often including catering and decoration upon request.

How far in advance should I book a private yacht charter in Marbella?

For peak season (June, September) book at least four to six weeks ahead; for other months two weeks is usually sufficient.

Are there any hidden costs for a private yacht charter in Marbella?

Always check if the quoted price includes fuel, skipper, food and beverages, as some charters charge those separately; VAT is typically included.

Planning your own private day on the water is straightforward with BoatHire24, a worldwide marketplace where you can rent a boat in Marbella or list your own. Whether you choose a crewed Sunseeker or a catamaran, the Mediterranean awaits.

Written by the BoatHire24 team, who book and list verified boats in Marbella and hundreds of destinations worldwide.
